purpose: Revise prompt for a failed framework_mappings draft.
system_addendum:
SECTION YOU ARE REVISING: framework_mappings

If aws_anchor_present failed: ensure framework_mappings.aws.references[0] exists with all required AWS-specific fields (lens, pillar, focus_area, question, best_practice, implementation_step with number/title/verbatim_text) when mapping_state is verified.

If common_fields_complete failed: ensure every reference has mapping_state + last_checked + note.

If verbatim_text_matches_source failed: replace any paraphrased verbatim_text with the AWS source text exactly.

If mapping_state_honest failed: downgrade overstated mappings. Only mark verified when you have actually checked against source documentation. Use unverified for provisional matches; na for confirmed-no-analogue.

If note_explains_value_add failed: rewrite notes to be specific. For AWS notes, name what AWS leaves unspecified that the principle concretises (where the artefact lives, who validates, when it gates, how it's proved). For AIGP / other framework notes, explain the cross-reference rationale and whether the mapping is structural or thematic.

If parallel_form_with_siblings failed: align the structure with siblings — same framework keys present, same nesting depth.
user_template:
Revise this framework_mappings.

<statement>{{ statement_title }}</statement>
<expected_aws_anchor>
  <best_practice>{{ aws_bp }}</best_practice>
  <implementation_step><verbatim_text>{{ aws_step_verbatim }}</verbatim_text></implementation_step>
</expected_aws_anchor>
<siblings_framework_mappings>{{ sibling_framework_mappings }}</siblings_framework_mappings>
<failing_draft><framework_mappings>{{ candidate_framework_mappings }}</framework_mappings></failing_draft>
<rubric_scores>
  <aws_anchor_present score="{{ score_aws_anchor_present }}">{{ justification_aws_anchor_present }}</aws_anchor_present>
  <common_fields_complete score="{{ score_common_fields_complete }}">{{ justification_common_fields_complete }}</common_fields_complete>
  <verbatim_text_matches_source score="{{ score_verbatim_text_matches_source }}">{{ justification_verbatim_text_matches_source }}</verbatim_text_matches_source>
  <mapping_state_honest score="{{ score_mapping_state_honest }}">{{ justification_mapping_state_honest }}</mapping_state_honest>
  <note_explains_value_add score="{{ score_note_explains_value_add }}">{{ justification_note_explains_value_add }}</note_explains_value_add>
  <parallel_form_with_siblings score="{{ score_parallel_form_with_siblings }}">{{ justification_parallel_form_with_siblings }}</parallel_form_with_siblings>
</rubric_scores>

Return the JSON object specified in the output contract.
